name: Crisp Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add sugar to shortening and cream together until fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs one at a time.
3. Add cream and flavoring.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix into the creamed mixture well.
6. Chill the dough.
7. Roll out small amounts of dough very thin on a lightly floured board or canvas.
8. Cut with various shaped cookie cutters.
9. Place cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Sprinkle with additional granulated or colored sugar.
11. Bake in a 400°F oven for 6 to 9 minutes, until golden.
12. Makes 6 dozen medium-sized cookies.
